python -m tracker_eval.cli.run_tracker \
  --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/train /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test \
  --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs \
  --tracker elptnet \
  --elptnet_cfg_file /home/scai/trackers/ELPTNet/jrdb.yaml \
  --elptnet_track_class pedestrian \
  --elptnet_fps 15.0 \
  --no_skip_existing


python -m tracker_eval.cli.run_tracker \
  --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/train /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test \
  --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs \
  --tracker cbmot \
  --cbmot_track_class pedestrian \
  --cbmot_fps 15.0 \
  --no_skip_existing


python -m tracker_eval.cli.run_tracker \
  --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/train /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test \
  --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs \
  --tracker fastpoly \
  --fastpoly_config /home/scai/trackers/FastPoly/config/nusc_config.yaml \
  --no_skip_existing


python -m tracker_eval.cli.run_tracker \
  --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/train /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test \
  --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs \
  --tracker ab3dmot \
  --ab3dmot_log_dir /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs/ab3dmot_logs \
  --no_skip_existing


python -m tracker_eval.cli.run_tracker \
  --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/train /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test \
  --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs \
  --tracker gnnpmb \
  --gnnpmb_parameters_path /home/scai/trackers/GnnPmbTracker/configs/gnnpmb_parameters.json \
  --gnnpmb_classification pedestrian \
  --gnnpmb_fps 15.0 \
  --no_skip_existing


python -m tracker_eval.cli.run_tracker \
  --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/train /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test \
  --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs \
  --tracker simpletrack \
  --simpletrack_config /home/scai/trackers/SimpleTrack/configs/nu_configs/giou.yaml \
  --no_skip_existing




python -m tracker_eval.cli.run_all_trackers \
  --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/train /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test \
  --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs \
  --no_skip_existing



python -m tracker_eval.cli.convert_gt_to_kitti_3d   --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/train /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test   --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs --global_coords --odometry_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/steamlo_odom

python -m tracker_eval.cli.run_all_trackers --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs --tracker_subfolder data --variants_subdir detections_3D_pseudo --variants_from_manifest /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test/detections_3D_pseudo/manifest.json --parallel --global_coords --odometry_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/steamlo_odom
python -m tracker_eval.cli.run_all_trackers --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs --tracker_subfolder data --variants_subdir detections_3D_pseudo --variants_from_manifest /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test/detections_3D_pseudo/manifest.json --parallel --global_coords --odometry_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/steamlo_odom --no_skip_existing
python -m tracker_eval.cli.run_all_trackers --split_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/test --out_root /mnt/nvme/tracker_eval_outputs --tracker_subfolder data --global_coords --odometry_root /mnt/nvme/JRDB_track/steamlo_odom --no_skip_existing
